description: Real-time 1–4 step synthesis via ADD distillation

model._hint: Base: stabilityai/sdxl-turbo — SDXL distilled via ADD. sai-nc-community license — non-commercial only; commercial use requires Stability AI membership. ~6 GB; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

generation._hint: 1 step sufficient for rough drafts. 4 steps gives the best quality/speed trade-off per model card. | CRITICAL: guidance_scale MUST be 0.0 — ADD distillation has CFG baked in. Any positive value degrades quality severely. | Native 512×512 per model card. 768×768 works but may introduce minor artifacts.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates photorealistic images in as few as 1 step using Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD). Ideal for rapid iteration and near-real-time generation. Non-commercial use only.
notes.prompt_guide: No trigger word. Negative prompts have NO effect at guidance_scale=0.0. Write positive-only prompts. Examples: 'a photorealistic portrait of a man in a forest, soft light', 'a futuristic city at night, neon lights', 'a cat sitting on a couch, warm indoor lighting'.
